CustomField.description: The Opportunity Stage picklist value assigned to new installment Opportunities created by Recurring Donations. Must match an existing Opportunity Stage value, typically an open/active stage like "Pledged" or "Prospecting." If blank, NPPatch uses the first available open stage. Applies to both legacy and Enhanced Recurring Donations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opportunity Stage for new installment Opportunities. Must match an existing Stage value. If blank, uses the first open stage.
CustomField.label: Stage Name for Installment Opportunities
